changelog.title: What's New shows automatically
changelog.desc: When a new version is available, the What's New popup now appears on its own. No banner to click, no link to find.

changelog.title: Task Card Titles Fixed
changelog.desc: Task card titles now use the correct readable font, matching Saved Drafts and Content Planner cards.

changelog.title: This Week's Focus
changelog.desc: A no-pressure weekly checklist on your dashboard. Pick 1-3 things, check them off, reset at the start of each week. No dates, no pressure.

changelog.title: Task Card Design Updated
changelog.desc: Task cards now use the tan background with a teal bottom strip.
